title: Blooming Spring
description: Get swept up in spring and give them a bath and bodycare gift with products to scrub, soak and soften inspired by flowering cherry blossom trees and watch love bloom.

images.alt: Blooming Spring gift. A wrapped, graphic pink box with a red "Blooming Spring" tag, a blue pot of blue body scrub, a pink bath bomb, a "Smitten" hand cream tin, and a pink soap with a gold butterfly.

The image shows a gift set featuring a wrapped pink box with a "Blooming Spring" tag, a bath bomb, a small tin, a circular soap, and a pot of body scrub. All items are arranged on pink podiums with blossom branches against a blue backdrop.
